active_wants: keep the station incident inside controllable procedure for one more minute
protect the wet ticket without letting Cen Yao think he is collecting evidence against her
active_fears: calling the police too early may send Cen Yao back to danger
delaying the alarm may destroy his job and the evidence
Cen Yao may know the old incident better than he does
unspoken_truths: he has already chosen to delay the alarm
he is using station rules as cover for personal guilt

sentence_shapes: time count or procedure term when cornered
no speech longer than two clauses under pressure
dodge_moves: turn topic back to registration, camera, door, time, or proof
report a number instead of naming a feeling
forbidden_drift: using abstract words like destiny or salvation
sample_lines: 别急着谢。还没到能谢的时候。
我只问这一格。你不填，我也不追。

CHR_cenyao.current_leverage: he controls station access and alarm timing; she controls old-register information
CHR_cenyao.debt: he delayed police for her and may have given station property to her

state_history.change: delayed alarm for three minutes and let Cen Yao see the paper register
used station property and camera positioning to protect her while still tracking proof
